zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter de Beke Lord of Eresby於1140年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾時，他的父親Geoffrey de Bec25歲，母親Ann Dapiler36歲。他和Agnes FitzPincheon heiress of Eresby至少有1個兒子。他去世於1167年在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾斯皮爾斯比艾雷斯比享年27歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Beke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Flemish and Dutch: variant of   Beek  .
Hungarian (also Béke): most probably from a Hungarian form of the Turkish status name beg (see Beg ). Alternatively, it may be a pet form of a Hungarian personal name such as Benedek .

variants.name: Beek
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Ernst, Johannes, Kurt, Otto.

Dutch and North German: topographic name for someone who lived by a stream or creek, beek (compare Bek 6), or a habitational name from any of various Dutch places called Beek (in Limburg, Gelderland, and North Brabant), named with the same word.

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Walter de Beke Lord of Eresby was born in 1140, in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Geoffrey de Bec, was 25 and his mother, Ann Dapiler, was 36. He had at least 1 son with Agnes FitzPincheon heiress of Eresby. He died in 1167, in Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 27.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walter de Beke Lord of Eresby est né en 1140, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Geoffrey de Bec, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Ann Dapiler, avait 36 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Agnes FitzPincheon heiress of Eresby. Il est décédé en 1167, à Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 27 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Walter de Beke Lord of Eresby 1140 in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Geoffrey de Bec 25 und seine Mutter Ann Dapiler 36. Er hatte mit Agnes FitzPincheon heiress of Eresby mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1167 im Alter von 27 Jahren in Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Agnes FitzPincheon heiress of Eresby. Morì nel 1167, nel Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 27 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Walter de Beke Lord of Eresbyが1140年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Geoffrey de Becは25歳，母Ann Dapilerは36歳であった。彼はAgnes FitzPincheon heiress of Eresbyとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1167年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスパルスビーエレスビーで27歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Walter de Beke Lord of Eresby(이)가 1140년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Geoffrey de Bec(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Ann Dapiler(은)는 36세였다. 그는 Agnes FitzPincheon heiress of Eresby(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1167년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 스피스비 레스비에서 27세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walter de Beke Lord of Eresby родился в 1140 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Geoffrey de Bec было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Ann Dapiler, 36. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Agnes FitzPincheon heiress of Eresby. Он умер в 1167 г. в местности эресби, спилсби, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 27 лет.
